title: Emergency Evacuation Plan
scenario: Create a detailed emergency evacuation plan for a 5-story office building with 50 employees. The plan should explain safety protocols, exit routes, and emergency contact information. The plan should be written in a clear, concise manner suitable for employees to follow in case of an emergency.
constraints: Must be formatted as a numbered list
Must include a diagram of the building's floor plan

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated plan adheres to the given constraints (numbered list, diagram, word count).
The plan is clear and easy to understand for the target audience.
The plan includes accurate and up-to-date safety protocols, exit routes, and emergency contact information.
